---
title: "`Colors` and *Style*"
subtitle: ""
author: ""
date: ""
image: "https://brand.umich.edu/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Design-Resources-Pg_COLORS_sized-400x250-1.jpg" # <-- image to be used in links to slides
image-alt: Color swatches for University of Michigan colors # <- alt text for accessibility
format:
 revealjs: # see https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/
   theme: [../michigan.scss] 
footer: "👈 Click on Block M for menu | [Return to the website](index.qmd)"
---

# michigan.scss

styles all documents based on [University of Michigan](https://brand.umich.edu/design-resources/colors/) font and color guidance (see [HTML Theming](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-themes.html))

#00274C Nunito Sans for body text

[#2F65A7 for links]()

> #655A52 for blockquotes

`#FFCB05 to highlight inline code`

## Callouts {.smaller}

::: {.callout}
#655A52 for basic [callout boxes](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/callouts.html)
:::

::: {.callout-note}
#75988d for callout-note boxes
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
#A5A508 for callout-tip boxes
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
#9A3324 for callout-warning boxes
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
#D86018 for callout-caution boxes
:::

::: {.callout-important}
#FFCB05 for callout-important boxes
:::


## Slide menue logo

```scss
/*-- make menue logo the block M --*/
.reveal .slide-menu-button .fa-bars::before {
  background-image: url('https://brand.umich.edu/assets/brand/downloads/um-logos/primary_logo_kit/black-logo/u-m_logo-black.png') !important;
}
```

![](https://brand.umich.edu/assets/brand/downloads/um-logos/primary_logo_kit/black-logo/u-m_logo-black.png "Block M slide menu logo")
